nodes.name: test-design.md
nodes.summary: Designs a complete test strategy for a story by classifying each testable behavior into the appropriate level (unit, integration, or e2e) and priority tier, avoiding redundant coverage.

nodes.name: trace-requirements.md
nodes.summary: Builds a requirements traceability matrix mapping each story acceptance criterion to corresponding test cases using Given-When-Then patterns, surfacing coverage gaps.

nodes.name: validate-next-story.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensively validates a drafted story before implementation by checking template completeness, file structure, acceptance criteria clarity, and alignment with architecture and epic requirements.
